reviews.review_description: I'm really liking this pinball game :) fun and very relaxing enjoyment ! The graphics are decent full 3D and realistic controls :) I really feel like as if I were in Japan ! Lots of cool Japanese style prizes you can win too!!! :D my only issue is I'm using the Oculus Go and the fps kind of stutters when you turn your head.. Thank you very much developer for this outstanding video game!!! :D
Lots of tables and nice interface. Would like the developer to add global leaderboards for each table.

Quite a straight forward no stress game. This is called pinball. In the UK we would call it bagatelle.
The game room is really really bland. It has no character whatsoever. The worst aspect of this game for me is the music. It starts to do your head in after a while and the game has no settings in which to mute or turn it off. Why!!? Most apps usually have this functionality.
You can, of course, turn the headset right down, but if you do that you loose all the other sound effects. 
I think that the reviewer who said, it makes him feel like he's in Japan, must be on drugs.
The game does what it's supposed to do, and so, with that, I've given it a generous 4 stars.
